zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard III duc de Normandie於1001年出生在法國阿奎泰洛吉吉加洛時，他的父親Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie38歲，母親Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie19歲。他和Adèle de France至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1027年8月6日在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利盧享年26歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利盧。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard III duc de Normandie was born in 1001, in Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, France, his father, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, was 38 and his mother, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, was 19. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Adèle de France. He died on 6 August 1027, in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, at the age of 26, and was buried in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard III duc de Normandie est né en 1001, à Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, France, son père, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Adèle de France. Il est décédé le 6 août 1027, à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 26 ans, et a été enterré à Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard III duc de Normandie 1001 in Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie 38 und seine Mutter Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie 19. Er hatte mit Adèle de France mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. August 1027 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard III duc de Normandie è nato il nel 1001 nel Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Adèle de France. Morì il 6 agosto 1027, nel Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 26 anni, e fu sepolto a Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard III duc de Normandieが1001年にフランスアクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンで生まれた時，父Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandieは38歳，母Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandieは19歳であった。彼はAdèle de Franceとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1027年8月6日にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンで26歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメロウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard III duc de Normandie(이)가 1001년 프랑스 아키테인 로트-트-가니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Adèle de France(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1027년 8월 6일 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에서 26세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 루언에 묻혔다.

pt.van 24 augustus 1026 to 6 augustus 1027: de 24 de agosto de 1026 a 6 de agosto de 1027
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard III duc de Normandie nasceu em 1001, em Lot-et-Garonne, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Adèle de France. Ele faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1027, em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, com 26 anos, e foi sepultado em Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard III duc de Normandie родился в 1001 г. в местности лот-ет-гаронн, аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Richard II 'le Bon' duc de Normandie было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith de Bretagne duchesse consort de Normandie, 19. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Adèle de France. Он умер 6 августа 1027 г. в местности роуен, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция в возрасте 26 лет и был похоронен в местности роуен, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Adèle de France. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1027, en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 26 años, y fue sepultado en Rouen, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
